name: Rice Cake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a rice cake on a plate.
2. Spread the softened cream cheese evenly over the rice cake.
3. Add the fruit preserves on top of the cream cheese.
4. Each serving provides: 78 calories, 2.2 g protein, 2.6 g fat, 11.6 g carbohydrate, 0.1 g dietary fiber, 84 mg sodium, and 8 mg cholesterol.
Source: "Light, Lean & Low Fat" booklet (Reprinted with permission from USA Rice Council Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias)
